name: Discord Channel Poster
description: Post entity updates, new art, and campaign events to Discord channels via webhooks. Supports rich embeds with images, auto-posting, and multi-channel targeting.
author: BiloxiStudios

default_webhook_url.label: Default Discord Webhook URL
default_webhook_url.description: Primary Discord webhook URL for posting

bot_username.label: Bot Display Name
bot_username.description: Name shown in Discord for webhook posts

bot_avatar_url.label: Bot Avatar URL
bot_avatar_url.description: Avatar image URL for webhook posts

auto_post_on_create.label: Auto-post on Entity Create
auto_post_on_create.description: Automatically post to Discord when a new entity is created

auto_post_on_update.label: Auto-post on Entity Update
auto_post_on_update.description: Automatically post to Discord when an entity is updated

embed_color.label: Embed Color (hex)
embed_color.description: Color for Discord embed sidebar, e.g. #5865F2
